pr.title: Remove GENERATE_MAP=1 portion of Publish packages
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Removed the GENERATE_MAP=1 build check from the publish-packages GitHub Actions workflow. The matrix no longer includes the build-linux target, and the Docker step that ran Melee with MAKE_FLAGS="GENERATE_MAP=1" was deleted, leaving the package workflow focused on gen-pages and check-issues.

key_files.reason: Only changed file; removed the build-linux matrix entry and deleted the GENERATE_MAP=1 Docker build step from the publish packages workflow.

what_changed: Changed the workflow matrix target list from ["build-linux", "gen-pages", "check-issues"] to ["gen-pages", "check-issues"].
Deleted the step named "Try building Melee (GENERATE_MAP=1)".
Removed the conditional build step guarded by startsWith(matrix.target, 'build-').
Removed the Docker invocation that mounted the repository read-only, mounted an output directory, and passed MAKE_FLAGS="GENERATE_MAP=1".
smart_moves: Removed the obsolete matrix target together with its only associated conditional step, avoiding a dangling CI matrix entry.
Kept unrelated workflow behavior intact: Docker image setup remains, and the check-issues path remains guarded by matrix.target == 'check-issues'.
Reduced publish-package workflow scope by eliminating a build validation task that was specifically tied to GENERATE_MAP=1 rather than package publishing itself.
decomp_lessons: CI workflow matrices should stay aligned with actual steps; if a conditional branch is removed, remove its matrix target as well.
Build or map-generation validation can be separated from package publishing workflows to avoid unnecessary work in publishing-related jobs.
For decomp CI maintenance, remove stale MAKE_FLAGS-specific checks only when the corresponding workflow target is also retired.
naming_conventions: Workflow target names use short kebab-case labels such as gen-pages and check-issues.
The removed build matrix target used the build-* naming pattern, specifically build-linux, which paired with startsWith(matrix.target, 'build-').
The removed output directory for map generation was named generate_map, matching the GENERATE_MAP make flag.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactics are evidenced in this PR; it only changes a GitHub Actions workflow.
The only decomp-build-related detail is removal of a CI invocation using MAKE_FLAGS="GENERATE_MAP=1".
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
follow_up_queries: Find other workflows still invoking MAKE_FLAGS="GENERATE_MAP=1".
Check whether GENERATE_MAP=1 validation was moved to another CI workflow around PR 1501.
Search publish-packages.yml history for build-linux matrix target removal rationale.
